title: Sequential Circuit Design Flowchart
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of designing and analyzing a synchronous sequential circuit, highlighting the key components and their relationships.
relationships: State Diagram defines behavior for State Transition Table
State Transition Table is used to derive logic equations for Combinational Logic
Combinational Logic uses Flip-Flops to store state and determine next state
Outputs are generated by Combinational Logic
